payload.name: Database Reactivation Workflow (3)
payload.description:
Build an automated Database Reactivation Workflow — a Python-based system that:
1. Identifies dormant customers from Google Sheets
2. Generates personalized AI-driven reactivation messages using Claude API based on customer history and business type (gym, dental clinic, coaching)
3. Sends reactivation offers via email (Resend/Gmail API in production, console/file in demo)
4. Logs all actions to a SYSTEM_LOG sheet

Must support two modes:
- Demo mode with sample data, printing to console/file (--demo flag)
- Production mode connecting to real Google Sheets and sending real emails

The workflow triggers daily via schedule/cron, filters customers by churn score (>0.7), last campaign date (>30 days), and days since contact (>90), then generates tiered offers (informational, bonus points, discount) based on churn score thresholds.

Project structure:
- main.py (orchestrator)
- tools/ (fetch_customers, generate_offer, send_email, log_action)
- data/ (sample CSVs for demo)
- .env for API keys
- requirements.txt

The user wants research on patterns, libraries, email deliverability, churn score thresholds, and open-source references BEFORE building, followed by 20-30 clarifying questions covering demo mode output format, delivery method, language, error handling, compliance, etc.
